015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.zeromq;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Single;
019import org.bitcoinj.base.Network;
020import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
021import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Flowable;
022import io.reactivex.rxjava3.disposables.Disposable;
023import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.BehaviorProcessor;
024import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.FlowableProcessor;
025import org.bitcoinj.core.Block;
026import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
027import org.bitcoinj.core.Transaction;
028import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.BitcoinClient;
029import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.ChainTipPublisher;
030import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.ChainTipService;
031import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.jsonrpc.RxBitcoinClient;
032import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.RxBlockchainService;
033import org.consensusj.bitcoinj.util.BlockUtil;
034import org.consensusj.rx.jsonrpc.RxJsonRpcClient;
035import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
036
037import java.io.Closeable;
038import java.net.URI;
039import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
040import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
041import java.util.concurrent.CompletionStage;
042import java.util.function.Supplier;
043
044/**
045 *  Add conversion to bitcoinj-types to {@code RxBitcoinZmqBinaryService}. Also
046 *  uses the JSON-RPC client to fetch an initial {@link Block} so subscribers don't
047 *  have to wait ~ten minutes for one.
048 */
049public class RxBitcoinZmqService extends RxBitcoinZmqBinaryService implements RxBlockchainService, ChainTipService, Closeable {
050
051    private final FlowableProcessor<ChainTip> flowableChainTip = BehaviorProcessor.create();
052    private final Disposable blockSubscription;
053
054    public RxBitcoinZmqService(Network network, URI rpcUri, String rpcUser, String rpcPassword) {
055        this(new RxBitcoinClient(network, rpcUri, rpcUser, rpcPassword));
056    }
057
058    public RxBitcoinZmqService(BitcoinClient client) {
059        super(client);
060        blockSubscription = Flowable.fromPublisher(blockPublisher())
061                .flatMap(this::activeChainTipFromBestBlockPublisher)
062                .distinctUntilChanged(ChainTip::getHash)
063                .subscribe(this::onNextChainTip, flowableChainTip::onError, flowableChainTip::onComplete);
064    }
065
066    @Override
067    public Publisher<Transaction> transactionPublisher() {
068        return Flowable.fromPublisher(transactionBinaryPublisher())
069                .map(bytes -> Transaction.read(ByteBuffer.wrap(bytes)));   // Deserialize to Transaction
070    }
071
072    @Override
073    public Publisher<Sha256Hash> transactionHashPublisher() {
074        return Flowable.fromPublisher(transactionHashBinaryPublisher())
075                .map(Sha256Hash::wrap);            // Deserialize to Sha256Hash
076    }
077
078    @Override
079    public Publisher<Block> blockPublisher() {
080        return Flowable.fromPublisher(blockBinaryPublisher())
081                .map(ByteBuffer::wrap)
082                .map(Block::read)  // Deserialize to bitcoinj Block
083                .startWith(defer(client::getBestBlock)); // Use JSON-RPC client to fetch an initial block
084    }
085    
086    @Override
087    public Publisher<Sha256Hash> blockHashPublisher() {
088        return Flowable.fromPublisher(blockHashBinaryPublisher())
089                .map(Sha256Hash::wrap);             // Deserialize to Sha256Hash
090    }
091
092    @Override
093    public Publisher<Integer> blockHeightPublisher() {
094        return Flowable.fromPublisher(chainTipPublisher())
095                .map(ChainTip::getHeight);          // Extract block height
096    }
097
098    @Override
099    public ChainTipPublisher chainTipPublisher() {
100        return ChainTipPublisher.of(flowableChainTip);
101    }
102
103    @Override
104    public void close()  {
105        super.close();
106        blockSubscription.dispose();
107    }
108
109    /**
110     * Return a <i>cold</i> {@link Single} for calling a provided <b>asynchronous</b> JSON-RPC method.
111     * (Uses a supplier to make sure the async call isn't made until subscription time)
112     * <p>
113     *  A  <i>cold</i> stream does not begin processing until someone subscribes to it.
114     * @param supplier of completable
115     * @param <RSLT> The type of the expected result
116     * @return A <i>cold</i> {@link Single} for calling the method.
117     */
118    private <RSLT> Single<RSLT> defer(Supplier<CompletionStage<RSLT>> supplier) {
119        return Single.defer(() -> Single.fromCompletionStage(supplier.get()));
120    }
121
122    private Publisher<ChainTip> activeChainTipFromBestBlockPublisher(Block block) {
123        return Flowable.defer(() -> Flowable.fromCompletionStage(activeChainTipFromBestBlock(block)));
124    }
125
126    /**
127     * Convert best {@link Block} to active {@link ChainTip}. If BIP34 is activated this
128     * is purely computational, otherwise I/O is required to fetch the {@code ChainTip}
129     *
130     * @param block Input best block
131     * @return active ChainTip assuming parameter block is the "best block"
132     */
133    private CompletableFuture<ChainTip> activeChainTipFromBestBlock(Block block) {
134        int height = BlockUtil.blockHeightFromCoinbase(block);
135        if (height != -1) {
136            return CompletableFuture.completedFuture(ChainTip.ofActive(height, block.getHash()));
137        } else {
138            return client.getChainTipsAsync()
139                    .thenApply(ChainTip::findActiveChainTipOrElseThrow);
140        }
141    }
142
143    // For setting breakpoints
144    void onNextChainTip(ChainTip tip) {
145        flowableChainTip.onNext(tip);
146    }
147}
